bot.name: 3AmShoppmeBot
bot.description: Customer support chatbot for 3AmShoppme e-commerce store

intents.name: GetPopularProducts
intents.description: User wants to see popular or trending products
intents.closingResponse: Check out the Trending section on our home page — it's updated daily with the hottest items! You can also browse all products at any time.

intents.name: ReturnPolicy
intents.description: User asks about return or refund policy
sampleUtterances: how do I return an item
how do I get a refund
how long do I have to return
intents.closingResponse: We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. Start a return from your Orders page and we will process your refund within 3-5 business days!

intents.name: ContactSupport
intents.description: User wants to contact customer support
intents.closingResponse: You can reach our support team at support@3amshoppme.com or call 1-800-3AM-SHOP. We are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week and typically respond within 1 hour!

intents.name: TrackOrders
intents.description: User wants to find or track their orders
intents.closingResponse: I will take you to your orders page right now!

intents.name: ShippingInfo
intents.description: User asks about shipping times or costs
intents.closingResponse: We offer free standard shipping on orders over $50! Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2 days) is available for $9.99. We ship internationally to over 30 countries.

intents.name: FallbackIntent
intents.closingResponse: I am not quite sure how to help with that. You can ask me about our products, return policy, shipping, or orders. Or contact our support team at support@3amshoppme.com!
